required_tools.name: github-mcp
required_tools.reason: All projects use GitHub for code management and version control.

required_tools.name: kubernetes-mcp
required_tools.reason: Project involves extensive Kubernetes infrastructure provisioning, deployment, and management, as indicated by tasks and the presence of numerous CRDs in the infrastructure context.

required_tools.name: postgresql-mcp
required_tools.reason: PostgreSQL is the primary database for all backend services (Equipment Catalog, RMS, Finance, Customer Vetting) and is provisioned in Task 1.

required_tools.name: redis-mcp
required_tools.reason: Redis/Valkey is used for caching and rate limiting in the Equipment Catalog and RMS services, and for session caching in the AI Agent. It is provisioned in Task 1.

required_tools.name: s3-mcp
required_tools.reason: S3/R2 storage is required for image serving in the Equipment Catalog Service and configured in Task 1.

required_tools.name: prometheus-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Equipment Catalog Service (Task 2) and the Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) expose Prometheus metrics for observability.

required_tools.name: stripe-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Finance Service (Task 4) requires integration with Stripe for recording payment events.

required_tools.name: opencorporates-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Customer Vetting Service (Task 5) integrates with the OpenCorporates API for business verification.

required_tools.name: openai-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) is configured to use 'openai-api/gpt-5.4-pro' as its underlying language model.

required_tools.name: signal-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) integrates with Signal-CLI for messaging capabilities.

required_tools.name: elevenlabs-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) integrates with ElevenLabs for natural voice synthesis.

required_tools.name: twilio-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) integrates with Twilio for SIP/PSTN voice calls.

required_tools.name: cloudflare-mcp
required_tools.reason: The Morgan AI Agent (Task 6) requires Cloudflare Tunnel for secure external access to its web chat interface and webhooks.

required_tools.name: openclaw-mcp
required_tools.reason: Task 6 is dedicated to implementing the core Morgan AI agent using the OpenClaw platform, which orchestrates other MCP tools.

recommended_tools.name: argocd-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: ArgoCD is present in the cluster services and is a strong candidate for managing GitOps deployments and continuous delivery of Kubernetes applications, especially given the project's focus on Kubernetes.

recommended_tools.name: loki-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: Loki services are running in the cluster, suggesting a centralized logging solution that would be beneficial for observing all deployed services.

recommended_tools.name: terraform-mcp
recommended_tools.reason: While Kubernetes/Helm is specified for provisioning, Terraform is a common tool for managing broader infrastructure as code, which could be useful for initial cloud resource setup or managing external dependencies.
